title: agrimonia dahurica var. pilosa
intro: Agrimonia dahurica var. pilosa is a variety of the Agrimonia dahurica plant, commonly known as sweet agrimony, which is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Agrimonia dahurica var. pilosa include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as providing antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusions, or used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
